text_en:
🛑 Israel's renewed attacks on Lebanon

🔺️ The Israeli Air Force has launched a wave of airstrikes towards southern Lebanon (Hezbollah positions).

⚠️ These attacks started last night and are still ongoing!

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

🛑 Tehran was attacked

💥 A very loud explosion was heard in Tehran and thick smoke rose, but details of this attack are still unclear

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

🔺️ Israel's Defense Minister said we have launched a preemptive attack against Iran.

🔺️ This attack took place around the Pasteur area.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

🔺️ IRIB: Columns of smoke rising from several areas of Tehran following multiple explosions heard

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

🔺️ Israeli Army: Warning sirens have sounded across Israel in recent minutes.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

🔺️ Dense smoke right now on Jomhuri Street in Tehran:

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

🔺️ Reuters reported a joint US and Israeli attack on Iran.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

💥 Sound of explosion in east Tehran right now

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

🛑 URGENT 🛑

🔺 As we've mentioned extensively in recent times and the news has shown, apparently moments ago an attack on Iran was reported

🔺 We still don't have confirmed reliable information about the extent and results of the attack, but we will cover any news that comes in as soon as possible

⚠️ There's also an important note: a crisis has been created again, and some people always try to add four members to their channel by spreading false news and creating stress for people. Therefore, do not pay attention to unreliable and unconfirmed news. We also try our best to monitor news from reliable sources and relay it to you.

Long live Iran and Iranians 🇮🇷✌️

🆔 @akhbarenfejari

🔺️ Fars: Initial reports indicate several missiles hit Daneshgah Street and the Republic area.

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
According to citizens' reports, two other explosions have also occurred in the Seyyed Khandan area of Tehran, presumably due to missile strikes
Channel 12 of the Zionist regime, citing a security official, claimed that this attack is a joint American-Israeli operation
Israel has closed its airspace
Israeli radio claimed: So far, approximately 30 targets across Iran, including the residence of Iran's president and an intelligence headquarters, have been attacked
Severe cyber attacks have also begun. Mobile phones in some areas of Tehran have been cut off

The newspaper 'Yedioth Ahronoth' of the Zionist regime reported a large number of targeted assassinations. Unconfirmed reports that the Palace of Justice and the Supreme Court of Tehran have been subjected to Israeli airstrikes

The United States, for the second time, resorted to weapons at the negotiating table. An American official in an interview with Al Jazeera announced that the United States is conducting joint attacks with Israel
Fox News and CNN also claimed that Israel has begun 'preventive attacks' against Iran
Based on the issued NOTAM, the airspace of the entire country has been closed until further notice
Tehran Stock Exchange trading has been halted

🔺️ Sound of explosion at Mehrabad Airport, Qom and Isfahan

🆔 @akhbarenfejari
